comments.message: Over 15. 7 runs. Bowler: Sakib Hussain. Rajasthan Royals: 127/6(rr 8.47)
OUT! Bowled. Sakib Hussain to Donovan Ferreira. Reverse Swing-Out length ball, outside off stump on the front foot Slog, hit pad.

Sakib Hussain to Donovan Ferreira. Reverse Swing-Out length ball, wide outside off stump on the front foot Slog, mis-timed in the air uncontrolled to mid on for 2 runs, dropped catch by Hussain, direct hit by Kishan, fielded by Arora.
FOUR! Sakib Hussain to Donovan Ferreira. Reverse Swing-Out length ball, wide outside off stump on the front foot driving, well timed in the air under control past deep extra cover for 4 runs.
Sakib Hussain to Donovan Ferreira. Reverse Swing-In yorker, outside off stump on the front foot driving, missed for no runs, fielded by Arora.

Sakib Hussain to Ravindra Jadeja. Reverse Swing-Out half volley, outside off stump on the front foot Slog, mis-timed to long on for 1 run, fielded by Klaasen.

APPEAL! Eshan Malinga to Donovan Ferreira. Reverse Swing-In half volley, to leg on the front foot Slog, hit pad to backward square leg for 1 run, fielded by Hinge, appeal made for L.B.W.

Nitish Kumar Reddy to Donovan Ferreira. Off cutter length ball, outside off stump moves in front Slog, mis-timed in the air uncontrolled to deep square leg for 1 run, fielded by Dharmasena.

OUT! Caught. Praful Hinge to Riyan Parag. Half volley, wide outside off stump on the front foot driving, outside edge in the air uncontrolled to second slip, caught by Sharma. Five down for Rajasthan Royals in no time.

OUT! Caught. Sakib Hussain to Yashasvi Jaiswal. Out-swinging short, down leg side on the back foot cutting, mis-timed in the air uncontrolled to third man, caught by Reddy. What's happening? Sakib Hussain joins the party.

Over 1. Power Play Fielding. 1 run. Bowler: Praful Hinge. Rajasthan Royals: 1/3(rr 1.00)

OUT! Caught. Praful Hinge to Lhuan-dre Pretorius. Out-swinging length ball, down leg side on the front foot flick, mis-timed in the air uncontrolled to deep backward square leg, caught by Reddy. What a dream debut for Praful Hinge!
Praful Hinge to Lhuan-dre Pretorius. Out-swinging length ball, middle stump on the back foot driving, missed for no runs, fielded by Arora.
OUT! Bowled. Praful Hinge to Dhruv Jurel. In-swinging back of a length, outside off stump on the back foot Steer, inside edge. Dragged on! Jurel walks back in disdain.
Praful Hinge to Dhruv Jurel. Half volley, wide outside off stump on the front foot driving, mis-timed to cover for no runs, fielded by Verma.

OUT! Caught. Praful Hinge to Vaibhav Suryavanshi. Out-swinging back of a length, down leg side on the back foot pulling, top edge in the air uncontrolled to leg gully, caught by Arora. Oh, what a start! Sooryavanshi departs for a golden duck.
NEW BALL. Praful Hinge to Yashasvi Jaiswal. Out-swinging back of a length, down leg side on the back foot Steer, top edge in the air uncontrolled to third man for 1 run, fielded by Hussain.
Start of Rajasthan Royals Innings.
